sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, text_column String, number_column Int32);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '     Hello, ClickHouse!     ', 42), (2, '  Fuzzy Testing  ', 0), (3, '    Edge Cases   ', NULL), (4, '   SQL Injection   ', 1000);
SELECT id, trimBoth(text_column) AS trimmed_text FROM test_strings WHERE trimBoth(text_column) ILIKE '%ClickHouse%';
SELECT id, number_column, trimBoth(text_column) AS trimmed_text FROM test_strings WHERE number_column IS NOT NULL AND trimBoth(text_column) ILIKE '%e%';
SELECT id, count(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY trimBoth(text_column) HAVING trimBoth(text_column) ILIKE '%Test%';

SELECT a.id, trimBoth(a.text_column) AS trimmed_a, b.text_column AS trimmed_b FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON trimBoth(a.text_column) ILIKE trimBoth(b.text_column) WHERE a.number_column > 0;
SELECT id, SUM(number_column) AS total_count FROM test_strings GROUP BY id HAVING total_count ILIKE '%0%';
SELECT id, AVG(number_column) AS average_value FROM test_strings WHERE number_column IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id ORDER BY average_value DESC;
SELECT id, trimBoth(text_column) AS trimmed_text FROM test_strings WHERE (trimBoth(text_column) IS NULL OR trimBoth(text_column) ILIKE '%Fuzzy%') AND COALESCE(number_column, -1) > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT id, trimBoth(text_column) AS trimmed_text FROM test_strings WHERE number_column IS NULL;
SELECT count(*) FROM temp_results WHERE trimmed_text ILIKE '%Edge Cases%';
